name: AIDLC Pre-Code Generation
description: Before code generation begins, activates relevant powers and moves the board item to In Progress.

then.prompt: Read the project config from .kiro/steering/project-config.md. Check the Installed Powers Registry. For the current AIDLC unit about to start code generation: 1) If 'project-management' power is registered: find the matching GitHub issue and move it to 'In Progress' on the board. 2) If 'data-engineering' power is registered AND the unit involves Glue/EMR/Athena/Spark: note that this power should be used during code generation. 3) If 'infrastructure' power is registered AND the unit involves CDK/Terraform/CloudFormation: note that this power should be used for IaC validation. Report what powers were activated.
